title: Agent Handoff Benchmark Result
description: Structured record for a single agent handoff benchmark run (Phase 14D). Scores agent reasoning about task intent, execution boundaries, evidence ledger, claim-evidence map, and unsupported-claim refusal.

run_id.description: Stable run identifier in run_YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ format.

timestamp_utc.description: Benchmark run timestamp in YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ format.

benchmark_scenario.description: Benchmark scenario identifier. Must be agent_handoff_v1.

question_set_path.description: Relative path to the question set file used.

rubric_path.description: Relative path to the scoring rubric file used.

provider.description: AI provider name (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI, Google).

evaluator.description: Optional: name or team performing the evaluation.

package_path.description: Path to the .aieng package used as benchmark input.

excluded_capabilities.description: Capabilities that were explicitly excluded during the benchmark (MCP, RAG, external CAD, solver, etc.).

included_files.description: Files from the package that were provided to the AI.

category_scores.description: Scores for each of the 8 benchmark categories.

summary.description: Optional free-text summary of key observations from this run.

warnings.description: Any warnings, anomalies, or notes about the benchmark run.

$comment: Phase 14D: agent handoff benchmark scaffold results schema. benchmark_scenario must be agent_handoff_v1. max_score must be 16.
